summary: Iteration 12: Tested Weekly Goals suggestions feature. All 8 backend tests passed. All UI flows verified via Playwright. GET /api/goals/current returns suggestions + has_history. Empty state shows suggestion chips, Use Suggestions and Customise buttons. Modal has Apply all button and per-metric suggestion chips. Pre-fill works correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - reused existing test_session_iter10. Goals were temporarily cleared then restored to iter11 values (emails_sent:8, follow_ups:4, new_tracks:3, calls:2)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12: All suggestions features working. Backend: GET /api/goals/current returns suggestions={emails_sent:3, follow_ups:2, new_tracks:1, calls:1} (defaults, no history) and has_history=false. Frontend: Empty state shows 4 suggestion chips with correct values, 'Use Suggestions' button (data-testid='weekly-goals-use-suggestions-btn') saves immediately, 'Customise' (data-testid='weekly-goals-set-btn') opens modal pre-filled with suggestion values. Modal has 'Apply all' (data-testid='goals-apply-suggestions-btn') and per-metric chips (data-testid='goal-suggest-{key}'). Goals restored to iter11 values at end.
verified_features: GET /api/goals/current returns 'suggestions' object with all 4 metrics - PASS
Default suggestions when no history: emails_sent=3, follow_ups=2, new_tracks=1, calls=1 - PASS
Empty state shows 4 suggestion preview chips with correct values - PASS
Empty state has 'Use Suggestions' button that saves goals without modal - PASS
Empty state has 'Customise' button that opens modal - PASS
Modal pre-filled with suggestions when no goals set - PASS
Modal has 'Apply all' button that fills all inputs with suggestions - PASS
Per-metric suggestion chips in modal (goal-suggest-{key}) - PASS
Progress bars render normally when goals are set - PASS
